data.narrative:
Heven AeroTech is a Series B-stage company in Defense & Security founded by Bentzion Levinson, currently valued at $1.0B+ post-money following $100M+ in total capital raised. The peer universe comprises 10 comparable companies: 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms, with 5 same-stage, same-sector peers forming the primary comp set.

Two valuation methods apply. Stage-progression analysis takes the $1.0B last post-money valuation and applies a 1.9x multiplier typical for Series B advancement, yielding $1.9B. Peer-median analysis examines five same-sector, same-stage comparables—Vannevar Labs and Dream Security at $1.5B, Harmattan AI at $1.4B, and Castelion and Defense Unicorns at $1.0B each—producing a median of $1.4B and a range of $1.0B to $1.5B.

Triangulating these methods across the $1.4B median and $1.9B stage-progression result supports a valuation range of $1.2B (low) to $2.2B (high), with a midpoint of $1.6B. The current $1.0B+ valuation sits at the lower end of this range, reflecting typical Series B positioning. Key uncertainties include relative traction versus the peer set and the applicability of public-market multiples to this private cohort.
